name: Vegetable Rye Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2-3 TBSP finely chopped red bell pepper
1/2 Cup soy or rice milk (I used EdenSoy Vanilla. I've also used Rice Dream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pancake batter by mixing dry ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Add the liquid (soy or rice milk and water) to the dry ingredients and mix well until combined.
3. Let the batter stand for a few minutes.
4. Heat a skillet or griddle over medium flame.
5. Grease the skillet lightly with butter or your preferred low-fat greasing method.
6. Pour about 1/2 cup of batter onto the hot skillet to form four pancakes.
7. Cook the pancakes until they are browned on the bottom, then flip and cook on the other side for a minute.
8. Serve the pancakes with a sweet fruit sauce or enjoy them plain.
9. The finished pancakes will have a crisp crust and a chewy inside.
